title: Onboarding - Organized - Allow "Poly Lens" to use your location window [Android]
scenario: Location permission dialog appears when tapping "Enable now" on the Organized onboarding screen for device finding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. On the Organized screen, tap the 'Enable now' button.
4. Observe the system location permission dialog that appears.
expected: The system location permission dialog appears with options 'Allow Once' (or 'Only This Time' on Android), 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't allow'. The dialog text reads: 'Allow Poly Lens to use your location - Poly Lens uses your location to find your device. See the Poly Privacy Policy in General Settings for more information.' The user remains on the Organized page in the background.
